data_source: Counterfactuals deep-dive (352 resolved scenarios, bot/data/counterfactuals/scenarios.json) + prior forensics state. No new trades.csv (bot offline 579.2h).

exit_timing_gap.exit_agent_amendment: In TRENDING regime for BTC/ETH long: do NOT recommend close/tighten in first 2h unless thesis breaks or regime shifts. 87% of early SL hits occur in non-trending regimes. In trending, only 13% of early losses are real — patience pays. BTC_long 81% true-miss, ETH_long 58% true-miss confirm this is the primary leak.
exit_timing_gap.sol_short_unlock_note: SOL_short suspension blocks $614.80 of exit-timing recoverable value. The issue is stop placement (too tight), not directionality — TP1 reachable 67% of the time. Reinstatement with wider stops + hold-patience instruction could recover this alpha.

avg_slippage: UNKNOWN — no snapshot_entry column in trades.csv. Structural gap. Must add column on restart.
noise_stop_problem: 87% of early SL hits (<2h) in non-trending regimes (illiquid/ranging/unknown). Upgraded from 71.9% estimate. Confidence: 0.88

hold_time_forensics.interpretation: Noise stops fire before directional move materializes. Fix: TRENDING_MIN_HOLD should be 3h (not 2h).
hold_time_forensics.action: Upgrade Exit Agent proactive-close threshold: trending signals need 3h min hold (was 2h)

high_6_10x.verdict: NET NEGATIVE despite 41% WR — tail losses dominate

leverage_calibration.finding: High leverage amplifies tail losses. Max 5x aligns with data. Current max allowed: 3x in backtest (conservative). Verify live leverage cap on restart.
leverage_calibration.action: On restart: verify max leverage < 5x. Flag any position > 5x immediately.

unknown.note: HYPE_UNKNOWN anomaly (83% WR, n=6) elevates this. Exclude HYPE, unknown = ~30% WR typical.

fill_analysis.action: Add fill_status to trades.csv schema. Track partial fills as separate row type.

structural_gaps.priority: HIGH — slippage is a primary execution cost source
structural_gaps.fix: Add snapshot_entry to trade logging at signal generation time

structural_gaps.finding: llm_regime column empty in all trades — 12 regime A/B rules unmeasurable
structural_gaps.fix: Write regime classification to trades.csv at trade close

structural_gaps.finding: No fill_status column — partial fill rate unknown

new_findings_this_run.detail: Bot offline 504h (21.0d). Each hour deepens the leverage calibration data gap. 3-5x leverage = +$0.79/trade (n=68) is the key validated edge, but high leverage (6-10x) = -$0.38/trade (n=91) is the risk. Restart with max 5x is critical.
new_findings_this_run.action: On restart: log leverage tier for every trade; verify max_leverage <= 5x at execution.

wdraw_trend.verdict: DECLINING 3.5pp from all-time — monitor on restart

next_run_actions: On restart: verify leverage distribution (flag any > 5x)
On restart: add snapshot_entry logging to signal generation path
On restart: add llm_regime write to trade close path
After 20 closed trades: recompute slippage, noise_stop rate, fill rate
